---
title: 'D.G. Wolfe | Storyteller - New Author Site'
date: '2016-08-29T07:25:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '9092432874298922075'
blogger_filename: '/2016/08/dg-wolfe-storyteller-new-author-site.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News & Updates'
---

<br />
<table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody>
<tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/authorsite-a93a12226d5b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img border="0" height="122" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/authorsite-77ed95d8305f.jpg" width="400" /></a></td></tr>
<tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://dgwolfe.weebly.com/">DGWolfe.Weebly.Com</a></td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<br />
<br />
My new Author Site is up and running. Still tweaking, but it's ready to share. Check it out (<a href="http://dgwolfe.weebly.com/" target="_blank">HERE</a>).<br />
<br />
<br />
Darrell G. Wolfe<br />
â€‹Storyteller | INFJ | Strengths: Futuristic | Intellection | Learner | Ideation | Achiever | Command | Input | Focus | Multipotentialite
